_comment: Versioned-pin manifest for az-ai v2.0.2. Install with `scoop install schwartzkamel/az-ai@2.0.2`. Frozen at v2.0.2 — SHA256 below is the digest of the v2.0.2 GitHub Release artifact and never changes once filled at tag time. No checkver/autoupdate on versioned manifests by design. v2.0.2 supersedes v2.0.1 and v2.0.0 — both tagged but never published (see docs/launch/v2.0.1-release-attempt-diagnostic.md + v2-release-attempt-1-diagnostic.md).
description: Azure OpenAI CLI — AOT agent with Microsoft Agent Framework, personas/squads, cost estimator (pinned to v2.0.2)
post_install: Write-Host 'az-ai v2.0.2 (pinned) installed. Third-party notices bundled next to the binary:'
